changes.reason: Expand the under-sampled call-wall acceptance profile by relaxing net DEX from 1B to the next lower grid value while keeping positive dealer-flow confirmation intact.
Relax call-volume expansion from 0.10 to 0.05 to admit more VALID_0DTE wall-acceptance candidates without disabling the expansion concept.
Require a 30 second accepted-strike hold while flow is relaxed, reducing transient wall-chase entries versus the current shorter acceptance window.

expected_effect: Should increase call_wall_acceptance_long from a one-trade clean sample toward a measurable VALID_0DTE profile while avoiding the hard-saturated take-profit family. Tradeoff is possible added exposure from looser flow gates; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, profile MAE degrades materially, or added trades displace stronger pullback/squeeze entries.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long as an entry/option-confirmation sample-builder, not a take-profit experiment. The latest run shows call_wall_acceptance_long is underexplored but exceptionally clean: 1 VALID_0DTE trade, $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, and -11.7 MAE. Prior 1DTE and fallback tightening hurt score, and the novelty guardrail rejected TP-family changes, so this isolates call-wall entry confirmation thresholds only.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long has only 1 observed VALID_0DTE trade, but it produced $91 with -11.7 MAE and 455 PnL/exposure hour. Broader 1DTE/fallback tightening reduced score and net profit, so the next non-repeated test should expand a clean option-confirmed profile rather than tighten existing high-throughput profiles.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call Wall Acceptance Entry Sample Builder
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Single-trade evidence can overfit; looser DEX and call-volume thresholds may admit noisy continuation entries or steal fills from stronger pullback/squeeze profiles.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE state with positive net DEX, positive forward DEX, accepted call-wall/strike context, and modest call-volume expansion.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: At least 5 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE better than -60, worst MAE better than -100, total net profit at least 98% of run_001, and pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The regime is extremely favorable for long-only intraday continuation: 100 trades, 100% realized win rate, no slow >=12h trades, PSR 100%, and drawdown only 0.5%. The risk issue...

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Router Test
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL retained >=95% of leader 1DTE PnL, worst 1DTE MAE improves versus -603.75, average 1DTE MAE improves, and total score does not decline.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Path-Aware Tail Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves by at least 20%, average MAE improves, retained PnL >=95%, protected fast/low-MAE winner loss <=5 trades.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Builder
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 5 trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE better than -60, worst MAE better than -100, and total net profit retained >=98%.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant 1DTE Pullback Activation Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: New profile produces positive PnL, improves combined 1DTE average/worst MAE, and total score remains within 2% of leader.

next_experiments.config_bias: Do not modify no-0DTE fallback settings in the next risk-reducer batch unless isolated as its own holdout. Current fallback edits should be treated as rejected or inconclusive.

next_experiments.primary_metric: No degradation in total score, fallback PnL remains positive, and VALID_0DTE/1DTE experiments are not confounded by stale-profile edits.
